The '''T-6 "Thunderer"''' was a [[Heavy blaster pistol/Legends|heavy blaster pistol]] manufactured by [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech Industries]] in response to the creation of the [["Renegade" heavy blaster pistol/Legends|Renegade heavy blaster pistol]] by the [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]]. The "Thunderer" was created with the sole purpose of surpassing its rivals in pure power, and allowed BlasTech to claim the title "king of the blaster wars".<ref name="Gundark" />

==Details==
[[File:T-6-GFTPG.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The T-6 "Thunderer"]]
The T-6 "Thunderer" was extremely bulky and heavy, and remained just under the size limit to be considered a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|pistol]]. Its potential for inflicting damage was high, and packed a powerful shot with minimal kick-back. However, the barrel wasn't always capable of handling the [[Blaster/Legends|blaster's]] power, and some were known to warp if the owner didn't allow time for the barrel to cool between shots. If this occurred during a firefight, the [[Prismatic crystal/Legends|prismatic crystal]]s,<ref name="Gundark" /> which focused the weapon,<ref name="CSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> could become misaligned, causing the weapon to explode. The T-6 had capacity for twenty-five shots, and had a range of up to fifty [[Meter/Legends|meters]]. It cost seven hundred and fifty [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], with an additional twenty-five for a [[Power cell/Legends|power pack]].<ref name="Gundark" />

==History==
The T-6 heavy blaster pistol was first produced to compete with the [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation's]] [["Renegade" heavy blaster pistol/Legends|Renegade heavy blaster pistol]],<ref name="CSWE" /> with the intention of surpassing its rivals in terms of sheer power.<ref name="Gundark" /> Its power helped BlasTech win the so-called "blaster wars" between itself, SoroSuub, and [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc.]],<ref name="CSWE" /> allowing BlasTech to claim the title "king of the blaster wars".<ref name="Gundark" /> The T-6 was marketed as the ultimate superheavy blaster, and became known as the "Thunderer" among [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]].<ref name="CSWE" />
